title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the people might enjoy about their holidays and what kind of person might choose each type.

images.label: A
images.description: A family relaxing on a tropical beach, with clear blue sea and palm trees.

images.label: B
images.description: A couple walking through a historic city, exploring old architecture and narrow streets.

followUp.question: Which type of holiday do you think is the most rewarding? (Why?)

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what might attract people to travel in these ways and what the advantages and disadvantages might be.

images.label: D
images.description: Passengers relaxing in comfortable seats on a modern high-speed train.

images.label: E
images.description: A group of young backpackers with large rucksacks waiting at an airport terminal.

followUp.question: Which form of transport do you think is the best for long holiday journeys? (Why?)
